author: iam4x
subject: v2.3.0-beta.3
body: # [2.3.0-beta.3](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/compare/v2.3.0-beta.2...v2.3.0-beta.3) (2017-10-25) ### Bug Fixes * **connectors:** export as well ([0b78d75](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/0b78d75)) ### Features * **refinementList:** add escapeFacetHits parameter ([#2507](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/issues/2507)) ([9b1b7ee](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/9b1b7ee))
